title: Aomig Fashion Designer Kit for Girls with 4 Mannequins, 600+Pcs Learn Toys Sewing Kit for Kids, Girl Doll Dress Kit, Toys Clothes Making Kit for Teen Girls Kids Birthday Present Age 6-12+
features: 🎀CHILDREN'S FASHION DESIGN CRAFTS: Little designers rely on their imagination and practical ability to create perfect works. Designing costumes is a great family project that's not only fun, but extremely rewarding. It can improve children's aesthetics, color matching, hands-on ability, and increase self-confidence.

👗BE A REAL STYLIST: This fashion clothing design set can make your stylist dreams come true, whether it’s everyday outfits or party dresses, our set contains everything you need. First draw a beautiful clothing pattern in a sketchbook, then cut the fabric with scissors, measure the appropriate size with a tape measure, and finally wrap it around the mannequin.

🧵SAFE AND FUN CREATIVE PLAY FOR GIRLS: Two different mannequins, one can be used to complete the design by binding without needle and thread, the other can be used to complete the display design, made of needle and thread, please use under adult supervision. The mannequin features a unique grooved back design so kids can easily create beautiful seamless dresses using a simple tie and tape method, making it safe and suitable for all levels of inexperienced skills.

🧰COMPLETE TOOL SET: The set includes 7 packs of small accessories, 4 flower straps, 7 lace straps, 26 sheets of fabric, 2 Velcros, 4 fake models, 1 workbook, 1 pen, 1 roll of double-sided tape, 1 hot melt glue stick , 1 pair of scissors, 1 needle insert bag, 1 clothing template, 1 instruction sheet, 2 diamond stickers, 1 sewing card, 1 box of large-headed needles, 1 box of sewing needles, 1 caliper (some styles and colors are random).

🎁FUN GIFT IDEA: This doll costume set comes in a colorful box, making it the perfect gift for girls on birthdays, Christmas, Halloween, DIY events, treasure chest prizes, classroom prizes, sewing tools, homemade gifts, or artistic creations.
description: Features: - Our creative arts and crafts kits for kids will encourage them to develop communication skills, hand-eye coordination, social skills and fine motor skills while having fun. Multi-style makeup set. - Mannequins, different models and fabrics to create your dream clothing collection. A practical and fun way to engage with the world of fashion, giving free space for imagination and experimenting with craft skills. -Your little princess will be delighted with this DIY girls clothing design kit. This is the perfect gift for little girls for every occasion, birthdays, Halloween, Christmas and more. Specification: Product weight: 665G Material: Cloth Packing list: 600+ piece set (7 packs of small accessories, 4 flower straps, 7 lace straps, 26 sheets of fabric, 2 Velcros, 4 fake models, 1 workbook, 1 pen, 1 roll of double-sided tape, 1 hot melt glue stick , 1 pair of scissors, 1 needle insert bag, 1 clothing template, 1 instruction sheet, 2 diamond stickers, 1 sewing card, 1 box of large-headed needles, 1 box of sewing needles, 1 caliper (some styles and colors are random)) Packaging size: 28.3*19*8.5cm Notes: 1. Colors displayed on different monitors may vary slightly. 2. Children should use this product under adult supervision.
